base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_long_beam — a pickup_item from 1986 metroid. Long Beam — extends Power Beam range. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Long Beam — extends Power Beam range; found early in Brinstar
